text: For the field-installations package (SR Section H) we recommend Kai Wai Engineering Survey and Geophysics Limited at HK$153,450, the lowest-priced compliant offer. The competing bid, Fugro Geotechnical Services Limited, comes in higher at HK$187,480 after one understated monitoring line (H16, 24 x HK$880 = HK$21,120, not the stated HK$20,000) is corrected. Compared like-for-like against the tender's own scheduled rates (HK$314,000 on the same quantities), Kai Wai is well below benchmark on every instrument except one: the dual-tip conductivity probe (H14c) is quoted at HK$30,000 against the scheduled HK$13,000 — roughly 2.3x, the single line worth querying before award. Its LiDAR, camera, velocimeter and flowmeter rates all sit under the scheduled figures, and the monitoring and CCTV operation (H16/H17) are quoted at HK$700 per No.-Month against the scheduled HK$2,000 and HK$3,000. Kai Wai's column is its real submitted rates; the competitor figures are representative, and the tender scheduled rates are shown only as a benchmark, not as a competing bid. A person approves the award.
